tiers.intro: Arcane has reader and translator tiers. Higher tiers increase daily AI token limits; some features are planned for future releases.
tiers.tokenResetNote: Daily token limits reset at 00:00 UTC.

features.translationProjects: Translation projects, multi-language pairs, AI pipeline

about.title: About Arcane
about.whatIsDesc: Arcane is a web interface for translating novels with AI and glossary support. Import EPUB, FB2, TXT, CSV. Three-stage pipeline: analyze → translate → edit. Source languages: English, Korean, Chinese; Russian when the target is Belarusian. Target languages: Russian or Belarusian.
about.languagePairsDesc: English, Korean, or Chinese → Russian; English, Korean, Chinese, or Russian → Belarusian. Default project pair: English → Russian. One project glossary — canonical translated forms for the chosen target language.
about.feature1: AI translation with context and glossary
about.feature2: Project glossary for consistent names and terms; Russian declension helpers where applicable
about.feature5: Profile and reading history for registered readers
about.accountTiersLink: Compare account levels and token limits →
about.missionDesc: Give people faster access to quality translations in their native language — better than raw machine translation.
about.author: Author
about.authorDesc: Ilya Murashka. Ideas, help, collaboration — reach out on LinkedIn.
about.licenseDesc: Project developed with Cursor AI. MIT License.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.controllerDesc: Arcane is a pet project. Controller: Ilya Murashka. Contact: {{contactEmail}}
privacy.guestsDesc: Only interface language in browser localStorage. Server does not store guest data.
privacy.usersDesc: Email, password (hash), profile, reading history, reading position. Stored in Supabase.
privacy.authorsDesc: In addition: projects, chapters, translations, glossary, publications, token usage.
privacy.purposeDesc: Service operation, authentication, translation, token limit tracking. Data retained until account deletion.
privacy.operationalLogsDesc: In production we keep structured server logs for reliability and security (errors, request metadata, correlation IDs such as requestId, traceId, jobId, projectId, userId — not email). We do not log chapter text or full LLM prompts/responses. Logs may be stored via Axiom (about 30 days retention) and Vercel hosting stdout. When EU Central edge is configured, event log ingest, storage, and queries stay in that region; Axiom account management (authentication, billing, organization settings) may still use US infrastructure — see https://axiom.co/docs/reference/edge-deployments. Legal basis: legitimate interest in operating and securing the service.
privacy.localStorageDesc: We use localStorage for auth tokens, user cache, and interface language. We use cookies only for analytics (Google Analytics) when you accept analytics cookies; otherwise we do not set analytics cookies.
privacy.thirdPartyDesc: Vercel (hosting the web app and API), Supabase (database, auth, file storage), OpenAI (AI translation — chapter text is sent for processing; we do not send your email or account ID to OpenAI), Google Analytics (anonymous analytics: page views, events; loaded only after consent; IP anonymized; https://policies.google.com/privacy), Upstash Redis (server-side caching for performance; cached data from our DB: projects, profiles, reading history, token usage; temporary storage), Axiom (operational logs as described above). Data may be processed in the US or EU depending on provider and configuration; providers use Standard Contractual Clauses where required.
privacy.yourRightsDesc: Access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability, objection. Right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority (EU). Contact: {{contactEmail}}

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptanceDesc: Using Arcane means accepting these terms.
terms.readersDesc: Catalog and reading are free for everyone. Registered readers get a profile and reading history. Content is created by author-translators.
terms.authorsDesc: Cabinet, translation, export. Daily token limits by role. See account levels for details. You are responsible for your content.
terms.contentResponsibilityDesc: Arcane is a translation tool. You are responsible for what you translate and publish. For copyright-protected works, permission from the rights holder is required. We do not claim rights to translations.
terms.changesDesc: Terms may be updated. Continued use after changes means acceptance.

cookieBanner.title: We use cookies
cookieBanner.description: To improve the service we collect anonymous statistics. You can accept or reject analytics cookies.
